network.name: Nexoria Network
network.tagline: A connected ecosystem of digital ventures
network.description: Nexoria Network is the umbrella connecting a growing portfolio of digital platforms, tools, and communities. Each node is built with purpose — together they form something greater.

sites.name: Nexoria Core
sites.description: The central hub powering the Nexoria ecosystem — infrastructure, APIs, and integrations.

sites.name: Nexoria Labs
sites.description: Experimental projects and early-stage builds from the Nexoria innovation arm.

sites.name: Nexoria Studio
sites.description: Design, branding, and creative direction for Nexoria ventures and external clients.

sites.name: Nexoria Vault
sites.description: A curated toolkit and resource library for builders in the Nexoria ecosystem.

sites.name: Nexoria Community
sites.description: Where the Nexoria network gathers — forums, events, and collaborative spaces.
